smoke_walk_to_zero.description: Short runtime smoke; thresholds are not enforced.

zero_hold.description: Exact zero from reset; no gait limit cycle is allowed.

walk_to_zero.description: Abrupt stop request after established forward walking.

micro_forward.description: Nonzero micro forward command must produce small steps, not a dead zone.

micro_lateral.description: Nonzero micro lateral command must produce small side steps.

micro_diagonal.description: Low diagonal command exercises both nonzero axes below the old deadband.

turn_in_place_left.description: Pure positive yaw must turn through stepping rather than torso sway.

turn_in_place_right.description: Pure negative yaw must turn through stepping rather than torso sway.

lateral_left.description: Left side-step with oriented-sole clearance measurement.

lateral_right.description: Right side-step with oriented-sole clearance measurement.

forward_cadence.description: Normal forward command used to bound excessive touchdown frequency.
